display.purpose: Post titles. Largest type on a page; JetBrains Mono 800, tight tracking, never past ~2.25rem.

headline.purpose: Section headers, paired with a full-width ink rule instead of an eyebrow.

title.purpose: Card titles and the author name.

body.purpose: UI copy, bios, card excerpts (reading sans).

prose.purpose: Long-form article body, capped ~70ch; article headings switch back to mono.

label.purpose: Chips, tags, theme toggle, meta strips (mono, often uppercase).

shadows.name: tile
shadows.purpose: Default hard offset shadow for cards, panels, profile header (8px for the largest).

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: Hover state for clickable cards, paired with translate(-3px,-3px).

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Standard easing for lifts and reveals; no bounce.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single action color. Hard offset shadow, presses in on click.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.375rem; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-weight:700; color:#ffffff; background:#2563eb; border:3px solid #16181d; box-shadow:3px 3px 0 0 #16181d; padding:0.5rem 1rem; cursor:pointer; transition:transform .075s ease, box-shadow .075s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform:translate(-1px,-1px); box-shadow:4px 4px 0 0 #16181d; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:translate(1px,1px); box-shadow:none; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Neutral action on recessed paper fill; same hard-shadow mechanics.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.375rem; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-weight:700; color:#16181d; background:#f6f6f1; border:3px solid #16181d; box-shadow:3px 3px 0 0 #16181d; padding:0.5rem 1rem; cursor:pointer; transition:transform .075s ease, box-shadow .075s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { transform:translate(-1px,-1px); box-shadow:4px 4px 0 0 #16181d; background:#ffffff; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform:translate(1px,1px); box-shadow:none; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Pixel Chip
components.description: The one chip primitive. Highlight variant (yellow) for categories; neutral variant for tags.
components.css: .ds-chip { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.35rem; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.02em; line-height:1.4; border:2px solid #16181d; box-shadow:2px 2px 0 0 #16181d; padding:0.15rem 0.5rem; background:#f6f6f1; color:#555a63; } .ds-chip-hi { background:#facc15; color:#713f12; } .ds-chip .ds-hash { color:#2563eb; }

components.name: Pixel Input
components.description: Mono text field; border and shadow both shift to Action Blue on focus (no glow).
components.css: .ds-input { width:100%; box-sizing:border-box; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:0.875rem; color:#16181d; background:#ffffff; border:3px solid #16181d; box-shadow:3px 3px 0 0 #16181d; padding:0.5rem 0.75rem; } .ds-input::placeholder { color:#555a63; opacity:0.7; } .ds-input:focus { outline:none; border-color:#2563eb; box-shadow:3px 3px 0 0 #2563eb; }

components.name: Blog Card
components.description: Clickable tile; whole card links, lifts toward the cursor on hover, title turns Action Blue.
components.html:
像素风排版验证

一篇用于预览阅读体验的临时文章。统一的边框与投影，锁定的强调色。

阅读 →
components.css: .ds-card { display:block; text-decoration:none; background:#ffffff; border:3px solid #16181d; box-shadow:4px 4px 0 0 #16181d; padding:1.25rem; transition:transform .18s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1), box-shadow .18s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1); } .ds-card:hover { transform:translate(-3px,-3px); box-shadow:7px 7px 0 0 #16181d; } .ds-card h3 { font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-weight:700; font-size:1.125rem; color:#16181d; margin:0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-card:hover h3 { color:#2563eb; } .ds-card p { font-family:ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; color:#555a63; font-size:0.875rem; line-height:1.6; margin:0 0 1rem; } .ds-card .ds-readmore { font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-weight:700; font-size:0.875rem; color:#2563eb; }

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: Sticky ≤64px bar with a 3px ink bottom border; pixel-M brand mark, mono links, theme chip.
components.html:
Mmilkrong/blog
GitHubDARK
components.css: .ds-nav { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; height:64px; padding:0 1rem; background:#ffffff; border-bottom:3px solid #16181d; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; } .ds-nav .ds-brand { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem; font-weight:800; font-size:1.125rem; color:#16181d; text-decoration:none; } .ds-nav .ds-brand .ds-mark { display:grid; place-items:center; width:1.5rem; height:1.5rem; background:#facc15; color:#713f12; border:2px solid #16181d; box-shadow:2px 2px 0 0 #16181d; font-size:11px; font-weight:900; } .ds-nav .ds-slash { color:#555a63; } .ds-nav .ds-navright { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.75rem; } .ds-nav a.ds-link { color:#555a63; text-decoration:none; font-size:0.875rem; } .ds-nav a.ds-link:hover { color:#2563eb; } .ds-nav .ds-chip { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.02em; border:2px solid #16181d; box-shadow:2px 2px 0 0 #16181d; padding:0.15rem 0.5rem; background:#ffffff; color:#16181d; }

narrative.overview: A developer's published notebook rendered as a hand-built pixel machine. Every surface is a thick ink-bordered tile that casts a hard, blur-free offset shadow, as if pieces of paper were stacked on a workbench and pinned down. The chrome speaks in mono (JetBrains Mono); the long-form writing relaxes into a clean reading sans. The mood is crafted, playful, honest — a person who builds their own tools and enjoys it, not a brand performing polish. It is dual-theme from the ground up: a warm graph-paper light mode and an off-black dark mode that share one structural language, where the 'ink' inverts to a light off-white so borders and shadows keep reading.
keyCharacteristics: Hard offset shadows (solid, zero blur) instead of ambient elevation.
Mono for all chrome/headings; readable sans reserved for prose.
A two-job color palette: blue acts, yellow highlights, everything else is structure.
Motion is small and motivated; every loop honors reduced-motion.

rules.name: The Two-Job Palette Rule
rules.body: Blue is the only action color and yellow is the only highlight color, used identically on every surface. Green and red are semantic-only. A third accent on a new screen is wrong — pull it back to ink, blue, or yellow.

rules.name: The Inverting-Ink Rule
rules.body: Borders and shadows are always --ink, never a fixed black. In dark mode --ink becomes light, so the entire brutalist structure survives the theme flip without per-component overrides.

rules.name: The Mono-Brand Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono carries 100% of the chrome — brand, nav, headings, buttons, labels, numbers. The reading sans is reserved exclusively for long-form prose and UI sentences.

rules.name: The Hard-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Every shadow is a solid offset of --ink with 0 blur and 0 spread. A blurred, soft, or semi-transparent drop shadow is forbidden. If it looks like a 2014 Material card, the blur radius is the bug.

rules.name: The No-Radius Rule
rules.body: Corners are square (--radius: 0). Pills, rounded cards, and soft 8px corners are prohibited; the brutalist edge is part of the identity.

dos: Do wrap every surface in a 3px ink border + a hard offset shadow (Npx Npx 0 0 var(--ink)); that pairing IS the brand.
Do keep blue as the only action color and yellow as the only highlight, identically across every section.
Do set all chrome in JetBrains Mono, and all long-form reading in the sans.
Do keep corners square and shadows blur-free everywhere.
Do ship light + dark together, route shadows/borders through --ink, and give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion static fallback.
Do keep muted text (#555a63) dark enough for 4.5:1; bump toward ink if it's close.
donts: Don't reintroduce the generic SaaS/shadcn-default look — soft slate cards, default shadcn blue, rounded elevation.
Don't use AI-slop landing tropes: per-section uppercase eyebrows, 01 / 02 / 03 numbered scaffolding, gradient text, glassmorphism, or identical icon-card grids.
Don't use blurred, soft, or semi-transparent drop shadows (the Hard-Shadow Rule).
Don't use side-stripe accent borders (border-left > 1px as a colored stripe) on cards, callouts, or alerts.
Don't let 'corporate playful' creep in — emoji-as-personality or a mascot that tries too hard.
Don't set prose in mono or chrome in the sans, and don't introduce a third accent color.
